title: Huawei PDC400S12-CB power supply for S620
description: Huawei PDC400S12-CB is a power supply for the Huawei S620-24T16X8Y2CZ switch with an input power voltage of +48V/-48V DC, featuring hot swap capability. Output power 400W +48V DC: 40V to 57V DC 48V DC: -38.4V to -72V DC GPSR
